title: Gate 0 UX/D Evaluation
description: Structural UX and discoverability evaluation produced by lo-fi-builder immediately before presenting Gate 0 to the user. Written to lo-fi-frames/gate0-evaluation.json.

evaluated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the evaluation was run

warn.description: Number of checks that produced warnings

dimension.description: Which UX dimension this check evaluates

screen_id.description: The screen this check applies to

description.description: Human-readable description of what was checked

fix_cost.description: What artifact needs to change to fix this finding. wireframe = lo-fi frame layout; blueprint = screen-blueprints.json; flows = user-flows.json

fix_instruction.description: Specific, actionable instruction for how to fix the finding

gate_recommendation.description: proceed = all checks pass; fix_first = one or more FAILs require resolution before continuing; human_review = warns only, present to user for decision
